ddls:
CREATE TABLE "discussions" (
  "discussion_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each discussion */,
  "competition_id" TEXT /* Identifier for the competition or discussion category */,
  "personal_involvement" INTEGER /* Boolean flag indicating if the discussion involves personal content */,
  "theme" TEXT /* Theme of the discussion */,
  "discussion_month" INTEGER /* Month in which the discussion occurred */,
  "discussion_day" INTEGER /* Day of the month in which the discussion occurred */,
  "discussion_title" TEXT /* Title of the discussion */,
  "discussion_content" TEXT /* Content of the discussion */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the discussion was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the discussion was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean flag indicating if the discussion is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("discussion_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_discussions_competition_id FOREIGN KEY ("competition_id") REFERENCES competition_categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., member, moderator, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean flag indicating if the user is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "discussion_participation" (
  "participation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each participation event */,
  "discussion_id" INTEGER /* ID of the discussion the user participated in */,
  "user_id" TEXT /* ID of the user participating in the discussion */,
  "disc_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the discussion entry */,
  "participation_type" TEXT /* Type of participation (e.g., comment, like, reply) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the participation occurred */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the participation was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("participation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_discussion_participation_discussion_id FOREIGN KEY ("discussion_id") REFERENCES discussions ("discussion_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_discussion_participation_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "competition_categories" (
  "category_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category (e.g., GeneralDiscussion, ID_45W9) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the category was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the category was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_activity" (
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each activity event */,
  "user_id" TEXT /* ID of the user who performed the activity */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Type of activity (e.g., login, post, comment) */,
  "activity_date" TEXT /* Date of the activity */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the activity occurred */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the activity was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_activity_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_engagement" (
  "engagement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each engagement event */,
  "user_id" TEXT /* ID of the user whose engagement is being tracked */,
  "engagement_type" TEXT /* Type of engagement (e.g., likes, comments, posts) */,
  "engagement_value" INTEGER /* Value of the engagement metric */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the engagement occurred */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the engagement was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("engagement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_engagement_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "moderation_flags" (
  "flag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each moderation flag */,
  "discussion_id" INTEGER /* ID of the discussion that was flagged */,
  "user_id" TEXT /* ID of the user who flagged the content */,
  "flag_type" TEXT /* Type of flag (e.g., spam, harassment, off-topic) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the flag was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the flag was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("flag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_moderation_flags_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_moderation_flags_discussion_id FOREIGN KEY ("discussion_id") REFERENCES discussions ("discussion_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "discussion_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each discussion metric */,
  "discussion_id" INTEGER /* ID of the discussion whose metric is being tracked */,
  "metric_type" TEXT /* Type of metric (e.g., views, likes, comments) */,
  "metric_value" INTEGER /* Value of the metric */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the metric was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the metric was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_discussion_metrics_discussion_id FOREIGN KEY ("discussion_id") REFERENCES discussions ("discussion_id")
)
